---
title: |
  Code Template
subtitle: |
  Untitled Project: A great project
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  eval: true
  message: true
---


# Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
# To track computation time
start_time <- Sys.time()

# set width of console output
options(width = 80)


# Install and load required packages
p_required <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "here",
  "knitr",
  "sessioninfo",
  "kableExtra"
)
packages <- rownames(installed.packages())
p_to_install <- p_required[!(p_required %in% packages)]
if (length(p_to_install) > 0) {
  install.packages(p_to_install)
}
sapply(p_required, require, character.only = TRUE)
rm(p_required, p_to_install, packages)
```

# Propensity to React Visualization

```{r}
Propensity_React <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "03_final",
  "Propensity_to_React_index.csv"
))
country_codes <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "02_processed",
  "country_codes.csv"
))

regime_2024 <- read.csv(here::here("data", "02_processed", "regimes_2024.csv"))

standard_PR <-
  Propensity_React %>%
  mutate(
    RP_ic_std = (RP_ic - min(RP_ic, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      (max(RP_ic, na.rm = TRUE) - min(RP_ic, na.rm = TRUE))
  )

stakes_z <- Propensity_React %>%
  mutate(
    RP_ic_z = (RP_ic - mean(RP_ic, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      sd(RP_ic, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

stakes_z_by_canal <- Propensity_React %>%
  group_by(canal) %>%
  mutate(
    RP_ic_z = (RP_ic - mean(RP_ic, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      sd(RP_ic, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# optional

RP_overview <- stakes_z_by_canal %>%
  rename(country_iso3 = importer_iso3) %>%
  right_join(country_codes, by = "country_iso3") %>%
  select(country_name, canal, RP_ic_z)
```


```{r}
#| label: plots
top_by_canal <- stakes_z_by_canal %>%
  group_by(canal) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = RP_ic_z, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

top_country <- ggplot(
  top_by_canal,
  aes(x = RP_ic_z, y = reorder(importer_iso3, RP_ic_z))
) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  facet_wrap(~canal, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Propensity to React (z-score)",
    y = "Country",
    title = "Top countries",
    subtitle = "by standardized Propensity to React, per canal"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

ggsave(
  here::here("figures", "Top_Countries_per_Canal.png"),
  top_country,
  width = 10,
  height = 8
)

selected_countries <- c("USA", "CHN", "FRA", "KOR")

plot_data <- stakes_z_by_canal %>%
  filter(importer_iso3 %in% selected_countries)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = canal, y = RP_ic_z, fill = importer_iso3)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  labs(
    x = "Strait / Canal",
    y = "Propensity to React (z-score)",
    fill = "Country",
    title = "Propensity to React by Country"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


ggplot(
  plot_data,
  aes(x = canal, y = RP_ic_z, group = importer_iso3, color = importer_iso3)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~importer_iso3) +
  labs(
    x = "Strait / Canal",
    y = "Propensity to React (z-score)",
    title = "Propensity to React by Country"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r}
#| label: canal_summary
table1_canal_summary <- stakes_z_by_canal %>%
  drop_na(RP_ic_z) %>%
  group_by(canal) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_z = mean(RP_ic_z, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_z = sd(RP_ic_z, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_z = min(RP_ic_z, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_z = max(RP_ic_z, na.rm = TRUE),
    share_high = mean(RP_ic_z >= 1, na.rm = TRUE), # z >= 1
    share_low = mean(RP_ic_z <= -1, na.rm = TRUE) # z <= -1
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

kable(table1_canal_summary)
```

```{r}
#| label: country_summary
table2_country_summary <- stakes_z_by_canal %>%
  drop_na(RP_ic_z) %>%
  group_by(importer_iso3) %>%
  summarise(
    n_canals = n(),
    mean_z = mean(RP_ic_z, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_z = max(RP_ic_z, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_high = sum(RP_ic_z >= 1, na.rm = TRUE), # canals with z >= 1
    n_low = sum(RP_ic_z <= -1, na.rm = TRUE) # canals with z <= -1
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_z)) # optional: sort by mean_z or max_z


kable(table2_country_summary)
```


```{r}
#| label: table_3
regime_2024_bin <- regime_2024 %>%
  mutate(
    regime_type = case_when(
      regime_score >= 4 ~ "democracy", # 4 = stable dem, 5 = deepening dem
      TRUE ~ "autocracy" # 0-3 = various autocratic / hybrid
    )
  )

stakes_z_regime <- stakes_z_by_canal %>%
  left_join(regime_2024_bin, by = "importer_iso3")

table3_high_by_regime_canal <- stakes_z_regime %>%
  drop_na(RP_ic_z, regime_type) %>%
  mutate(high_prop = RP_ic_z >= 1) %>% # define high-propensity
  group_by(canal, regime_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_high = sum(high_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_total = n(),
    share_high = n_high / n_total
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

kable(table3_high_by_regime_canal)
```

# Session Info

```{r}
#| label: session-info
session_info()
```


# Computation Time

```{r}
#| label: computation-time
end_time <- Sys.time()

computation_time <- end_time - start_time

message(paste(
  "Computation completed in:",
  round(as.numeric(computation_time, units = "secs"), 2),
  "seconds.
"
))
rm(end_time, start_time)
```
